title: Razorpay is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Razorpay is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
